core_philosophy: A grounded, matte, and highly functional control room for the circular economy. Mixing earthy warmth with financial precision.

layout_and_spacing.card_style: bg-white rounded-lg border border-[#8D6E63]/15 shadow-sm transition-all duration-200

buttons.primary: bg-[#1B5E20] text-white hover:bg-[#144A18] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium tracking-wide shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-[#4CAF50] text-white hover:bg-[#388E3C] rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium shadow-sm
buttons.outline: border border-[#1B5E20] text-[#1B5E20] hover:bg-[#1B5E20]/5 rounded-md px-4 py-2 font-medium
buttons.ghost: text-[#4A554C] hover:text-[#1B5E20] hover:bg-[#1B5E20]/5 px-4 py-2 rounded-md

cards.dashboard_widget: bg-white border border-[#8D6E63]/15 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm
cards.data_table: bg-white border border-[#8D6E63]/15 rounded-lg overflow-hidden shadow-sm

inputs.default: border border-[#8D6E63]/30 rounded-md px-3 py-2 bg-white text-[#1A1C1A] placeholder:text-[#758077] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1B5E20]/50 focus:border-[#1B5E20] transition-colors

navigation.header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-[#8D6E63]/15

icons.style: stroke-width: 1.5, regular, scaled to match text

hero_and_auth.description: Abstract organic background texture for login/auth backgrounds.

abstract_decor.description: 3D clay geometric representation of circular economy. Use in empty states or investor dashboards.

biogas_plant.description: Industrial facility for the CBG Plant Operator dashboard visual/header.

rural_farmer.description: Rural farmer in field. Use in the Village Ward dashboard or profile area.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text meets APCA/WCAG AA contrast over backgrounds. Use shadow if text is over images.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case format (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build standard dashboard layouts with a sidebar and a top sticky header. The sidebar should have role-based navigation links.
Do not use dark mode colors; stick strictly to the Light Theme Earthy palette.
Use Outfit for headings and Manrope for tables and body text. Load fonts properly in HTML.
Ensure all dashboard cards (widgets) use the 'Control Room Grid' style with crisp 1px borders and slight 8px border-radius.
Integrate recharts/shadcn charts heavily to display waste stats, carbon credits, and investments. Add labels and legends matching the color palette.
Do not use transparent background on header. Ensure z-50 and use backdrop-blur.
Store entries via React state/context or LocalStorage only since this is a frontend-only app.
For the Waste Entry form, auto-calculate Carbon Credits (e.g., 1 ton biomass = X credits).
Never use raw image placeholder services; rely on the provided media URLs.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to all buttons, input fields, forms, and key display items.
